hooks.command: bash -c "echo '$HERMES_TOOL_INPUT' | grep -qE '\.env$|\.env\.' && echo 'BLOCKED: .env writes are forbidden. Credentials stay in .env only.' && exit 1 || exit 0"
bash -c "echo '$HERMES_TOOL_INPUT' | grep -qE 'cat .env|type .env|echo.*PASSWORD|echo.*SECRET' && echo 'BLOCKED: Never echo credentials to chat.' && exit 1 || exit 0"
bash -c 'cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null && echo "[HERMES SESSION] Local-first. Customer data never leaves this machine. Read brain/HERMES.md and brain/STATE.md before responding to Emmanuel."'
